hvac-filter-change.name: Replace HVAC filter
hvac-filter-change.consequencesOfSkipping: Reduced airflow, higher energy use, premature blower wear, and worse indoor air quality.

ac-tune-up.name: AC professional tune-up
ac-tune-up.consequencesOfSkipping: Compressor failure during peak season — emergency call-out rates and lost nights.

heater-service.name: Furnace / heater service
heater-service.consequencesOfSkipping: Mid-winter outage triggers refunds, frozen pipes, and emergency call-out rates.

smoke-detector-test.name: Test smoke + CO detectors
smoke-detector-test.consequencesOfSkipping: Code violation, insurance void, life-safety risk.

smoke-detector-battery.name: Replace smoke + CO detector batteries
smoke-detector-battery.consequencesOfSkipping: Chirping detectors during a stay = one-star reviews; dead detectors = code violation.

deep-clean.name: Deep clean (between full turnovers)
deep-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Grime buildup leads to lower review scores; hard surfaces lose finish over time.

gutter-clean.name: Clean gutters
gutter-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Water damage to fascia, foundation, or basement.

water-heater-flush.name: Flush water heater
water-heater-flush.consequencesOfSkipping: Sediment buildup shortens lifespan and reduces hot water capacity.

dryer-vent-clean.name: Clean dryer vent
dryer-vent-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Lint fire risk; longer dry times shred linens and raise utility bills.

pest-control.name: Quarterly pest control
pest-control.consequencesOfSkipping: One-star reviews, refunds, infestation eradication costs.

caulk-grout-inspect.name: Inspect & re-caulk bath/kitchen
caulk-grout-inspect.consequencesOfSkipping: Hidden water damage behind tile; mold remediation later.

grout-reseal.name: Reseal bathroom & kitchen grout
grout-reseal.consequencesOfSkipping: Stained, porous grout traps mildew and looks dirty even after deep cleans.

fridge-coil-clean.name: Refrigerator coil clean + interior detail
fridge-coil-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Compressor strain, energy waste, eventual fridge replacement years early.

washing-machine-clean.name: Washing machine self-clean cycle
washing-machine-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Linens come out smelling musty — guests notice instantly.

dishwasher-clean.name: Dishwasher clean + filter rinse
dishwasher-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Cloudy glasses and spotted plates ruin coffee-bar photos.

mattress-flip.name: Mattress flip / rotate
mattress-flip.consequencesOfSkipping: Premature sagging, body-impression complaints, accelerated replacement.

pillow-refresh.name: Pillow refresh / replace
pillow-refresh.consequencesOfSkipping: Yellowed, lumpy pillows are the #1 silent reason for 4-star (vs 5-star) reviews.

carpet-shampoo.name: Carpet shampoo (high-traffic rooms)
carpet-shampoo.consequencesOfSkipping: Trapped grit grinds carpet fibers — replacement happens 2-3 years sooner.

couch-deep-clean.name: Couch / upholstery deep clean
couch-deep-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Stains set permanently and cushion foam absorbs odors.

interior-touch-up-paint.name: Interior touch-up paint pass
interior-touch-up-paint.consequencesOfSkipping: Scuffs accumulate and the listing photos start to look stale.

exterior-pressure-wash.name: Exterior pressure wash
exterior-pressure-wash.consequencesOfSkipping: Curb-appeal photos go flat; siding develops mildew streaks.

driveway-seal.name: Driveway / asphalt seal coat
driveway-seal.consequencesOfSkipping: Cracking accelerates and full repaving runs 5x more than periodic seal coats.

exterior-paint.name: Exterior paint refresh
exterior-paint.consequencesOfSkipping: Wood rot, lower property value, weaker first-impression photos.

lawn-fertilize.name: Lawn fertilize / weed treatment
lawn-fertilize.consequencesOfSkipping: Patchy lawn drags hero-photo quality and curb appeal.

tree-pruning.name: Tree pruning + dead-limb inspection
tree-pruning.consequencesOfSkipping: Storm-dropped limbs damage roofs, vehicles, or guests — liability risk.

termite-inspection.name: Termite inspection
termite-inspection.consequencesOfSkipping: Termite damage is rarely covered by insurance and often runs five figures.

septic-pump.name: Septic tank pump
septic-pump.consequencesOfSkipping: Backups during a stay are catastrophic — emergency cleanups, displaced guests, refunds.

roof-inspection.name: Roof inspection
roof-inspection.consequencesOfSkipping: Small leaks become drywall replacements, mold, and lost nights.
